name: Emplifi Social Media and CX Platform API
what_it_does: Emplifi unified social media and customer experience platform REST API for enterprise brands to manage social publishing, social care, influencer marketing, social commerce, and customer experience analytics across social channels. Enables AI agents to manage multi-platform social content publishing and scheduling for enterprise social media automation, handle social customer care and inbox management for social CX automation, access influencer discovery and campaign management for influencer marketing automation, retrieve social commerce shoppable post management for social selling automation, manage social analytics and competitive benchmarking for social intelligence automation, handle sentiment analysis and customer feedback routing for CX automation, access live streaming and social video management for content production automation, retrieve employee advocacy program management for organic reach automation, manage paid social campaign integration for unified paid and organic social automation, and integrate Emplifi with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zendesk, and commerce platforms for end-to-end social CX automation.
use_cases: Publishing enterprise social content from multi-channel scheduling agents
Managing social customer care from CX automation agents
Running influencer campaigns from creator marketing agents
Enabling social commerce from shoppable content agents
not_for: SMB social media management (Emplifi targets enterprise brands)
PR wire distribution (use PR Newswire or Business Wire)
Basic social analytics without CX integration requirements
best_when: An enterprise brand wanting AI agents to automate unified social publishing, social customer care, influencer campaign management, social commerce, and CX analytics within Emplifi's integrated social and customer experience platform.
avoid_when: PLATFORM CONSOLIDATION COMPLEXITY: Emplifi was formed from merger of Socialbakers and Astute Solutions (2021) and acquisition of Pixlee TurnTo; product integration across merged platforms may have uneven API coverage; automated workflows spanning Emplifi's multiple product lines must verify API availability for each merged product capability. INFLUENCER PAYMENT AND CONTRACTING OUTSIDE PLATFORM: Emplifi influencer management handles campaign tracking but influencer payment and contract management may be outside platform scope; automated influencer program management must integrate with separate contract and payment systems; automated influencer payment via Emplifi alone creates payment tracking gap. SOCIAL CARE SLA ESCALATION AUTOMATION: Automated social customer care routing must maintain human oversight for complex customer issues; automated AI response to social care inquiries without human escalation path creates brand and customer experience risk for complex or sensitive customer complaints.

auth.notes: Emplifi uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. REST API with JSON. Columbus, Ohio HQ. Formed 2021 from Socialbakers (Prague-based, AI-social analytics) and Astute Solutions merger; acquired Pixlee TurnTo (UGC) in 2022. Backed by Audax Private Equity. Products: Social marketing, social commerce, influencer management, service cloud, analytics. Enterprise-focused (Fortune 500 customers). GDPR. SOC2. Platforms: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest. Competes with Sprout Social, Sprinklr, and Brandwatch for enterprise social and CX.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise annual contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual subscription; modular pricing by product (Social Marketing, Service Cloud, Social Commerce); custom enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Columbus OH. Audax PE backed. Enterprise annual contract. Modular product pricing. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; social and analytics queries throttled; webhooks for publishing, care, and analytics events

known_agent_gotchas: MERGED PLATFORM API ENDPOINT CONSOLIDATION STATUS: Emplifi merged multiple platforms (Socialbakers, Astute, Pixlee); API endpoint organization reflects merger history with some legacy endpoints alongside new unified endpoints; automated integration must use current API documentation rather than legacy Socialbakers or Pixlee API documentation to avoid deprecated endpoints

SOCIAL COMMERCE PLATFORM AVAILABILITY BY REGION: Emplifi social commerce features (shoppable posts, Instagram Shopping) have varying availability by social platform and geographic region; automated social commerce deployment must verify feature availability for target platform and region; automated shoppable post creation for platforms without social commerce enablement creates feature not available error

INFLUENCER AUTHENTICITY SCORE METHODOLOGY: Emplifi influencer discovery uses proprietary authenticity and performance scoring; automated influencer selection based on Emplifi scores must understand scoring methodology; influencer scores may change as Emplifi updates scoring algorithm; automated campaign targeting that assumes static influencer scores creates audience quality variance between planning and execution

UGC RIGHTS MANAGEMENT FOR PIXLEE CONTENT: Emplifi's Pixlee TurnTo UGC management requires explicit rights collection from UGC creators before commercial use; automated UGC curation and republishing must verify rights have been collected; automated UGC redistribution without rights collection creates copyright and FTC endorsement disclosure compliance issues

AI CONTENT SUGGESTIONS REQUIRING HUMAN REVIEW: Emplifi's AI-powered content suggestions for social posts require human creative review; automated content creation using Emplifi AI suggestions without editorial review creates brand voice inconsistency and potential accuracy issues in automated publishing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise social and CX. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. EU/US. Social content, customer care, and influencer data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise social CX. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. EU/US. Social, influencer, and customer care data.
